findings.message: Raw request body is logged as a structured field.
findings.recommendation: Log a stable event name and approved metadata instead of rawBody.

findings.message: Email and password appear in a log statement.
findings.recommendation: Omit password and avoid logging directly identifying email values.

findings.message: Authorization header or bearer token is logged.
findings.recommendation: Never log credentials, tokens, or authorization headers.

findings.message: SSN-like and credit-card-like values are logged.
findings.recommendation: Block, tokenize, or mask regulated identifiers before logging.

findings.message: Object destructuring may expose nested sensitive fields.
findings.recommendation: Log explicit approved fields rather than {@payload} object dumps.

findings.message: High-cardinality identifiers are used as log dimensions.
findings.recommendation: Use correlationId for tracing and avoid indexing user/session/customer IDs by default.

findings.message: Required governance fields are missing from log events.
findings.recommendation: Include service, environment, correlationId, and eventName on governed events.
